subcodes.first_line: O thou who art sincere in thy love of God! Two letters have reached me, both eloquently voicing praise unto God for His bestowals [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المخلص فی محبه الله قد وصلنی تحریران الناطقان بالثناء علی الله بما انعم
subcodes.subjects: @justice and mercy, @East and West; communication between East and West, @diversity an attribute; requirement of existence, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels, @growth of the Cause
